name: codexqb
description: CodexQB packages a three-step Codex planning workflow for main plans, phase sub-plans, and sub-plan audits.

interface.shortDescription: Run a three-step Codex planning workflow.
interface.longDescription: CodexQB helps Codex create a master project plan, decompose it into phase-level sub-plans, and audit the resulting planning package for coverage, ordering, readiness, and governance.
defaultPrompt: Use $codexqb to audit the planning docs.
